# Advisory Monks Consulting

> An independent multi-disciplinary advisory firm. CAs, CSs, advocates, lawyers, investment banking specialists, and transaction advisors. Based in Noida, India. Founded 2021.

Advisory Monks Consulting advises Indian founders, foreign companies, NRIs, institutional investors, and incubators across thirteen practice areas spanning legal, tax, regulatory, and financial advisory.

## Contact

- Email: info@advisorymonks.com
- WhatsApp: +91-8595116297
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/advisory-monks-consulting/
- Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

## Practices

- [India Entry & Foreign Co.](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/india-entry): Market entry, WOS/LLP/Branch Office setup, FDI and FEMA compliance, GST registration, transfer pricing.
- [Startup Legal & Fundraising](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/startup-legal): Incorporation, DPIIT recognition, Section 80-IAC, ESOP design, SHA/SSA drafting, Rule 11UA valuations.
- [VC & Investor Advisory](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/vc-advisory): Two-year legal and financial due diligence, investment agreement drafting, CP/CS tracking, portfolio compliance.
- [Incubator Institutional](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/incubator): Section 8 company frameworks, grant utilisation, portfolio equity templates, embedded legal counsel.
- [Pravasi Desk · Diaspora](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/pravasi-desk): For NRIs and OCI. Form 13 LDC, RNOR planning, USD 1M repatriation, DTAA/FTC, estate planning.
- [Cross-Border Tax & Structuring](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/cross-border-tax): DTAA analysis across 90+ treaties, Form 15CA/15CB, Outward Direct Investment, PFIC/GILTI for US persons.
- [Virtual CFO Services](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/virtual-cfo): MIS reporting, 13-week cash flow forecasting, compliance calendar, financial modelling, board pack delivery.
- [M&A Advisory](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/ma-advisory): Buy and sell-side diligence, Rule 11UA valuation, SPA drafting, NCLT schemes, CCI clearance, FC-TRS.
- [GCC India Advisory](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/gcc-india): Global Capability Centre setup, transfer pricing, FEMA, multi-state GST, statutory audit.
- [Valuation Advisory](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/valuation-advisory): Rule 11UA/11UAA, ESOP Black-Scholes, M&A DCF, IBC/NCLT valuations, Ind AS 113, fairness opinions, PPA.
- [Flip Structuring](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/flip-structuring): Indian startups going offshore. Delaware, Singapore, Cayman, IFSC GIFT City, UAE structuring.
- [Founders Tax Desk](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/founders-tax-desk): Personal tax for founders and UHNI. ESOP/RSU exercise, capital gains, ITR, HUF and Private Trust.
- [Global Outsourcing & Virtual CFO](https://www.advisorymonks.com/practices/global-accounting): Outsourced finance for global businesses — Virtual CFO, controllership, FP&A, management reporting and multi-entity consolidation.
